name: GPX Medical AB (publ)
summary: GPX Medical AB operates as a medical technology company. It offers neonatal intensive care with NEOLA, a medical device that offer continuous lung monitoring and real-time alerts of life-threatening complications using technology that measures lung volume changes and oxygen gas concentration. NEOLA provide intensive care and healthier lives for preterm born infants. The company was founded in 2016 and headquartered in Lund, Sweden.
